prompt: Create a full-body realistic fashion portrait of a young woman, a cute Japanese young woman, standing on a sunny rooftop observation deck in a modern city. She faces the camera with a relaxed gentle smile, slight head tilt, and casual standing pose, one knee subtly bent. She has shoulder-length wavy light brown hair with soft bangs, natural makeup, and translucent pink eyeglasses. Outfit: black sleeveless graphic tank top with a large distressed eagle print and faded rock-style lettering, layered silver necklaces, black pleated mini skirt with metal eyelets and dangling silver chains, bracelet, black slouchy leg warmers, and chunky black-and-white platform high-top sneakers with white laces. Background: a dense urban skyline with high-rise buildings, apartment blocks, and offices, seen from an elevated rooftop with gray concrete floor, waist-high metal safety railings, and a rectangular gray utility block at her side. Lighting: bright natural daylight, soft shadows, lightly cloudy blue sky, crisp but slightly shallow depth of field with the city background mildly softened. Style: photorealistic smartphone/fashion snapshot, vertical 9:16 composition, full body centered, natural skin texture, realistic fabric folds and metal accessories, no collage, no grid, no split screen, no multi-panel layout, no watermark, no extra people.

promptZh: 创作一张全身写实时尚人像，主角是一位年轻女性，一位可爱的日本年轻女性，站在现代城市阳光明媚的天台观景台上。她面向镜头，带着轻松温柔的微笑，微微歪头，姿势随意，一只膝盖轻微弯曲。她留着齐肩波浪卷发，浅棕色头发，配有柔和的刘海、自然妆容和透明粉色眼镜。服装：黑色无袖印花背心，带有巨大的做旧老鹰图案和褪色的摇滚风格字母，叠戴银色项链，黑色百褶短裙，配有金属孔眼和悬垂的银色链条，手链，黑色堆堆袜，以及厚底黑白高帮运动鞋，配白色鞋带。背景：密集的城市天际线，高楼大厦、公寓楼和办公楼，从高处天台俯瞰，地面为灰色混凝土，有齐腰高的金属安全护栏，她身旁有一个长方形的灰色设备箱。光影：明亮的自然日光，柔和的阴影，微云的蓝天，清晰但景深略浅，城市背景轻微虚化。风格：超写实智能手机/时尚快照，9:16 竖版构图，全身居中，自然的皮肤质感，逼真的织物褶皱和金属配饰，无拼贴，无网格，无分屏，无多面板布局，无水印，无额外人物。
